generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoderSensingComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor for angular position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoderSensingComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind the gearbox for angular position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensorSensingComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for measuring motor current I_M to derive torque via known motor constants"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensingComponent
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoderSensingComponent
]

instance CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensorSensingComponent
]

instance MeasuredInputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current I_M from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksMATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque from motor current I_M using known motor constants"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksMATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensingComponent
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity from position data"
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived acceleration from angular velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksMATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedFrictionOutputsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated outputs from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted, AngularVelocityData, MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksMATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance BlockDefinitionDiagramModel : DTDFVocab:System [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for mechanical structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLStructuralModelingEnabler
]

instance InternalBlockDiagramModel : DTDFVocab:System [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for mechanical structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLStructuralModelingEnabler
]

instance MotorSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:System [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for motor dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksMATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance GearwheelSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:System [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for gearwheel dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksMATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance GearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:System [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for gearbox dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksMATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellModel : DTDFVocab:System [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset metadata"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellsAASAssetManagementEnabler
]

instance SysMLStructuralModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables MultiPhysicsFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MathWorksMATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables MultiPhysicsFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellsAASAssetManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, MultiPhysicsFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCControllerRobotControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MultiPhysicsFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationToolsDataDisplayEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for integrated data display"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of friction models and data in a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides StaticFrictionParameterInsight, KineticFrictionParameterInsight, ViscousFrictionParameterInsight
]

instance MultiPhysicsFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models to enhance robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides StaticFrictionParameterInsight, KineticFrictionParameterInsight, ViscousFrictionParameterInsight, ControlAlgorithmAdjustmentAction
]

instance StaticFrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Static friction parameter identified from model-data deviation analysis"
]

instance KineticFrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Kinetic friction parameter identified from model-data deviation analysis"
]

instance ViscousFrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Viscous friction parameter identified from model-data deviation analysis"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Adjust control algorithm based on identified friction parameters for improved motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotorActingComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driven by input current I_M"
]

instance GearwheelComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel in gear transmission"
]

instance CycloidalGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox converting motor torque to output torque τ_out"
]

instance FirstVerticalRobotAxisSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First vertical robot axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot focusing on motor and gear transmission components for motion control accuracy"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotorActingComponent, GearwheelComponent, CycloidalGearboxComponent, MotorEncoderSensingComponent, SecondaryEncoderSensingComponent, CurrentSensorSensingComponent
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with live data streaming via MQTT, enabling continuous identification of friction models during robot operation without latency."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot axis components (motor, gearboxes), sensor data streaming via MQTT, Simulink-based processing components for friction model computation, AAS for contextual asset metadata, and dashboard visualization to create a unified digital shadow for friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, focusing on continuous monitoring and analysis of joint friction during active robot operation over time, accounting for wear and varying operational conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity assessed through deviation analysis between simulated data (from white-box/black-box friction models) and measured reference data, with validation of friction models against real-world operational conditions."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (current, position) from physical robot to digital shadow, enabling low-latency data transfer for continuous model updating."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) as part of Industrie 4.0 standards, SysML for systems engineering modeling, and adherence to Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) methodologies."
]
